content: Phase 1 POC-A: Create professional seed data (200+ gates, 50+ employees, schedules)
Phase 1 POC-B: Dashboard ops endpoint (KPIs, heatmap, alerts, timeline)
Phase 1 POC-C: Field worker endpoints (density + alert)
Phase 2.1: Rebuild Dashboard UI (ops room feel)
Phase 2.2: Seed data admin action in UI
Phase 2.4: Compact gate display (200+ gates) - existing dept overview shows data
Phase 2: End to end testing with testing agent
